agents.name: company_vault.py

agents.name: company_fidget.py

agents.name: company_librarian.py

agents.name: node_heartbeat.py

nodes.storage: microSD (external SSD migration pending — blocked on powered USB hub)

nodes.name: retail_node (pi5)

agents.name: retail_portal.py
agents.desc: Customer dashboard + API (gunicorn, port 5001). Phase C D2 refactor extracted 12 helpers from 4 hotspot endpoints (stripe_webhook, _enrich_positions, get_system_status, api_admin_market_activity) dropping line counts 46-87%.

agents.name: retail_watchdog.py
agents.desc: Crash monitor, auto-restart x3

agents.name: retail_market_daemon.py
agents.desc: Enrichment pipeline 9:10-16:00 ET (news/sentiment/macro/validator/screener/price_poller). No longer runs trader — see retail_trade_daemon.

agents.name: retail_trade_daemon.py
agents.desc: Continuous trader 9:30-16:00 ET, 30s cycle, MAX_TRADE_PARALLEL=3 subprocess pool. Same 14-gate logic, now runs at market speed instead of 30-min cadence. Phase 1 of TRADER_RESTRUCTURE_PLAN. Phase C D1 refactor: run() 897→15 lines via 11 named helpers (_run_halt_check, _start_watchdog, _init_clients, _run_gate0_account_health, _run_market_gates, _run_position_management, _run_managed_mode_approvals, _run_signal_evaluation, _run_monthly_tax_sweep, _send_session_summary, _send_daily_report).
agents.how: systemd (synthos-trade-daemon.timer, Mon..Fri 09:25 ET — re-enabled 2026-04-20T21:20 EDT after Phase C verification)

agents.name: retail_scheduler.py
agents.desc: Off-hours session orchestrator. Dispatches per-customer subprocesses for enrichment when market_daemon isn't covering the slot.
agents.how: cron — overnight :05 hourly weekdays (off-hours only), weekend :05 hourly Sat+Sun, Sunday 20:00 prep session. Uses SessionLock (fcntl flock) to prevent overlap. is_market_hours() now delegates to retail_shared (D6/R10-7).

agents.name: retail_interrogation_listener.py
agents.desc: UDP cross-validation, port 5556

agents.name: retail_trade_logic_agent.py
agents.desc: 14-gate trade execution + screener integration

agents.name: retail_news_agent.py
agents.desc: 22-gate news classification

agents.name: retail_market_sentiment_agent.py
agents.desc: 27-gate deterioration detection

agents.name: retail_sector_screener.py
agents.desc: Sector momentum scoring

agents.name: retail_candidate_generator.py
agents.desc: Phase 3b — emits sector-driven candidate signals (source='candidate', status='WATCHING'). Reads top-N per sector from sector_screening. Trader consumes via windows (Phase 3c).

agents.name: retail_window_calculator.py
agents.desc: Phase 3b/4 — precomputes macro+minor entry/exit windows per signal × customer into trade_windows. Phase 4.a adds ATR column; 4.b scales bands by ATR. Anchor still dynamic — pin revisit deferred post-Phase-5.

agents.name: retail_event_calendar.py
agents.desc: Phase 5.a — Gate 4 EVENT_RISK calendar. Nasdaq bulk earnings fetch + macro_events table. Called from market_daemon's enrichment tick.

agents.name: retail_tradable_cache.py
agents.desc: Audit Round 5 — Alpaca /v2/assets cache (~11k us_equity symbols). Candidate Generator uses is_tradable() to filter out crypto/delisted/OTC before emission. Refreshed once per trading day in premarket.

agents.name: retail_daily_master.py
agents.desc: Phase 5.c — end-of-day audit rollup. Renders logs/daily_master/YYYY-MM-DD.md with opens/closes/candidates/cooling-off/earnings tables. Fires at market close from run_close_session.

agents.name: retail_macro_regime_agent.py
agents.desc: Macro regime classifier (BEAR/BULL/NORMAL trend × volatility). Runs in enrichment pipeline.

agents.name: retail_market_state_agent.py
agents.desc: Market state detector (open/close/holiday) for session gating.

agents.name: retail_bias_detection_agent.py
agents.desc: Behavioral-bias detector (sector concentration, loss aversion, disposition effect).

agents.name: retail_fault_detection_agent.py
agents.desc: Data freshness + system resources + account health checks.

agents.name: retail_validator_stack_agent.py
agents.desc: Final enrichment stamp — promotes QUEUED → VALIDATED when all prior stamps present.

agents.name: retail_shared.py
agents.desc: Phase C D6 — canonical kill_switch_active() / get_active_customers() / is_market_hours() shared by market_daemon, scheduler, portal, trader, dry_run, window_calculator. Replaces 5 near-duplicate local copies. now_et() and fetch_with_retry() intentionally left local (diverged return types / stateful circuit-breaker globals).

agents.name: retail_sector_backfill_agent.py
agents.desc: One-off/periodic backfill for missing sector_screening rows.

agents.name: retail_price_poller.py
agents.desc: Shared live_prices for all customers

agents.name: rotate_logs.py
agents.desc: Weekly log rotation + 30-day archive cleanup

agents.name: retail_heartbeat.py
agents.desc: POST agent status to pi4b monitor (called directly by long-running services, plus hourly cron as a standalone ping)
agents.how: cron 21 * * * 1-5 (hourly :21 weekdays) + inline calls from daemons

agents.name: node_heartbeat.py
agents.desc: System metrics to monitor

agents.name: retail_boot_sequence.py
agents.desc: Network wait, integrity check — trade-daemon / market-daemon services After= this one so they wait for a healthy boot before firing

agents.name: retail_health_check.py
agents.desc: Post-reboot DB + Alpaca verify

agents.name: retail_patch.py
agents.desc: Safe file updater, rollback

agents.name: retail_backup.py
agents.desc: Nightly archive to pi4b staging

agents.name: retail_shutdown.py
agents.desc: Graceful pre-maintenance shutdown

agents.name: rebuild_default_template.py
agents.desc: Nightly customer DB template rebuild

agents.name: customer_health_check.py
agents.desc: Called by auditor for customer DB health

databases: customers/*/signals.db (tables: signals, positions, trade_windows, news_flags, earnings_cache, macro_events, cooling_off, outcomes, ...)
nodes.storage: NVMe (Patriot M.2 P300 256GB) — migrated from SD 2026-04-18
tools: synthos_build/tools/ (_fleet + 10 diagnostics: customer_audit, trader_audit, validator_investigate, sentiment_smoke, verify_schema, tier_readout, apply_tier_ladder, portal_lint, dead_code, lint, complexity)

nodes.name: pi2w_monitor_node

agents.name: node_heartbeat.py
agents.desc: System metrics to pi4b monitor

agents.name: node_watchdog.py
agents.desc: Pings pi4b + pi5 + display, alerts on failure

nodes.note: DISABLED 2026-04-20 — node unreachable via SSH (58 NODE_UNREACHABLE hits/day). Auditor now skips this node via 'disabled': True in REMOTE_NODES config (company_auditor.py). Re-enable by removing the flag when hardware returns.

nodes.name: pi2w_sentinel

agents.name: sentinel_wave.py
agents.desc: Live agent sine wave animation on 3.5" TFT

agents.name: node_heartbeat.py
agents.desc: System metrics to pi4b monitor

nodes.note: DISABLED 2026-04-20 — display powered off pending power-source relocation (was USB-powered from operator's main PC, needs standalone supply). No ETA for return. Removed from auditor NODES dict + system_architecture.json status 'disabled'. Restore when hardware comes back.

data_flow.trading_pipeline: Market Daemon (9:10-16:00) → Screener → News → Sentiment → Trade Logic (per customer) → 14 gates + screener boost → BUY / SKIP / WATCH → Alpaca API
data_flow.shared_data: Price Poller → live_prices table (every cycle). News/Sentiment → shared signals → all customers read same intel. Screener scores feed into Gate 5.
data_flow.monitoring: Auditor → SSH scans pi4b, pi5, pi2w → company.db suggestions. Sentinel ← heartbeats → silence alerts → Scoop. Librarian → SSH package audit → CVE alerts.
data_flow.backup_chain: pi5 retail_backup.py (1:30am) → tar.gz → POST to pi4b → Strongbox (2am) → AES-256 encrypt → Cloudflare R2 (30-day retention)

known_issues: Sentinel display needs reboot for rotation=0 + wave renderer debugging
Portal Chart.js blocked by Cloudflare tunnel CSP — charts render blank (tracked: backlog PORTAL-CSP-CHARTJS)
resolved: Backup chain pi5→pi4b working
Ghost cron entries removed
Write-access protection (company_lock.py)
Auditor cross-node SSH scanning
Timekeeper + Patches deleted, Blueprint archived
pi2w consolidated to heartbeat + watchdog
Sentinel display WiFi connected
FK constraint fix for multi-tenant signal routing
Schema migration system + nightly template rebuild
Mode terminology consolidated: AUTOMATIC/MANAGED everywhere
Admin override system: trading gate + operating mode fleet control
Market daemon replaces cron-based trading schedule
support.db separated from company.db (lock contention fix)
Auto-adopt orphan positions in reconciliation
Duplicate portfolio row race condition fixed
busy_timeout added to all company agents
Screener scores integrated into trade agent Gate 5
Sentiment data wired into intelligence cards
Log rotation system (weekly + 30-day archive)
Security hardening: auth checks on all endpoints
Password eye toggles on all forms
Pi5 retail stack migrated SD → NVMe (Patriot M.2 P300, 2026-04-18)
Diagnostic tools consolidated into synthos_build/tools/ (_fleet helper + 10 scripts)
Code-health trio added to tools/ (vulture, ruff, radon wrappers)
Early-access TOS modal + non-restrictive setup overlay — built dormant behind EARLY_ACCESS_TOS_ENABLED=False
rotate_logs.py landed in git (was running from cron on pi5 but untracked)
JS init-killer fixed: Jinja substitution inside a // comment produced a literal '<' that aborted dashboard init for all users (commit bba337a)
Phase 3c.a/b: Gate 5 window proximity nudge + trader window consumer (v1 news-triggered entry path removed)
Phase 4.a/b/d: ATR column on trade_windows + ATR-scaled bands + trader reads ATR from window (single source of truth)
Phase 5.a: Gate 4 EVENT_RISK scheduled-event calendar (Nasdaq earnings + macro_events table)
Phase 5.b: cooling_off after stop-out (24h default; Gate 4 sub-gate)
Phase 5.c: daily_master.md end-of-day audit rollup
Audit Round 1 (2026-04-20): 5 critical bugs fixed — missing time/timezone imports, out-of-scope trade_events, candidate-gen tx_date dedup, Gate 4 ticker dedup (killed AAPL runaway)
Audit Round 4 (2026-04-20): macro window anchor pinned (INSERT OR IGNORE) + .known_good/ cleanup (832K snapshot deleted) + portal customer_count template-var fix
Audit Round 5 (2026-04-20): BIL concentration alert (Gate 0 sub-gate + daily notification) + tradable-asset cache (Alpaca /v2/assets filter in Candidate Generator)
Audit Rounds 6-8 (2026-04-20): 11 small/medium Phase-B follow-ups — tradable_assets in main migrations, three F821 catches on re-sweep, validator missing-timestamp = STALE
Phase B re-run audit (2026-04-20): 139 → 70 findings across 5 subsystems, 50% reduction after Rounds 6-8 landed

Audit Round 9 (2026-04-20): transaction safety — reduce_position + update_portfolio now atomic (single with self.conn() block; same pattern close_position got in R7.2); price_poller INSERT loop + DELETE-stale wrapped in explicit BEGIN/COMMIT; cooling_off(ticker, cool_until) composite index; tradable_cache pagination-truncation warn at 1000-multiple boundary; get_api_call_history() rewritten to WHERE timestamp >= ? (was date(timestamp) pattern, R6 fixed sibling); _send_sms / _send_email now check r.ok + log on non-2xx; ATR / volume_avg log reason when empty; gate4/5/5.5/6 guard signal.get('ticker') or '' + portfolio.get('cash', 0)

Phase C Patch 1 (2026-04-20): D4 datetime.utcnow() → datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(tzinfo=None) across 26 sites in 10 files (Python 3.12 deprecation); D6 retail_shared.py created — kill_switch_active, get_active_customers, is_market_hours consolidated from 3-5 near-duplicate copies
Phase C Patch 2 (2026-04-20): D5 portal lint — 14 unused HTML id= attributes removed (zero CSS / JS / addEventListener references); snb-* and tab-* kept (dynamic showTab() string concat)

Phase C Patch 3 (2026-04-20): D2 portal complexity refactor — 12 private helpers extracted from 4 hotspot endpoints (_verify_stripe_signature + _handle_checkout_completed; _enrich_single_db_position + _extract_orphan_positions; _status_locked_mode + _compute_user_warnings; _parse_db_dt_to_et + _session_bin_index + _resolve_trading_session_date + _build_market_bins + _aggregate_customer_market_activity + _aggregate_user_sessions_historical). Line counts: stripe_webhook 196→84, _enrich_positions 112→14, get_system_status 182→99, api_admin_market_activity 366→165. Zero behavior changes.

Phase C Patch 4 (2026-04-20): D1 trader run() refactor — 897 lines → 15-line orchestrator via 11 named helpers. Data flow now explicit: db/alpaca/now/session_log created in _init_clients and passed to every downstream helper; positions refreshed at the top of each block; trade_events summed from three helpers. Zero behavior changes verified by dry-run against pi5 paper account.

Round 10 Patch A (2026-04-20): 4 mechanical fixes — sector_screener datetime.utcfromtimestamp → fromtimestamp(tz=utc) (Phase C D4 only caught utcnow); scheduler is_market_hours now delegates to retail_shared (D6 missed this site, boundary differed by 1s at 16:00); dead BIL rebalance guard removed (second `if buy >= threshold` was unreachable); news_agent fetch_with_retry now resets _fetch_circuit_open on successful fetch (was permanently sticky once tripped)

Round 10 Patch B (2026-04-20): open_position() and sweep_monthly_tax() now atomic (portfolio read + writes in one transaction); composite index idx_approvals_status_queued on pending_approvals(status, queued_at)

Round 10 Patch C (2026-04-20): _run_monthly_tax_sweep uses portfolio.get('realized_gains', 0); _status_locked_mode returns user_warnings=[] (missing field would crash JS); two sqlite3 connection leaks in portal wrapped in context managers

Round 10 Patch D (2026-04-20): retail_shared docstring explains why fetch_with_retry stays local; politician-weight bare-excepts downgraded to log.debug; SessionLock + _business_day_offset gain defensive docs (2 false-positive audit findings)
BIL_OVER_ALLOCATED health-check exempts sub-$500 accounts (was firing on $61 test account with $39 in BIL); kept catching real-account defensive-posture ($39,997/$59,995)
Auditor gains 'disabled' flag for nodes — pi2w_monitor skipped until hardware returns (was 58 NODE_UNREACHABLE hits/day)

pi4b synthos-company repo cleaned — untracked data/backup_status.json + fidget_latest.json (runtime drift); gitignore broadened for logs/* / *.bak / *.pre_*_bak / data/archives/; 3 stale *.pre_dbleak_bak files deleted (Apr 14); git status now empty
